WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_HUSK.title: Arcane Husk
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_HUSK.description: Start each combat with [blue]{TotalShield}[/blue] [gold]Shield[/gold], [blue]{ShieldCapacity}[/blue] [gold]Shield Capacity[/gold] and [blue]{ShieldRecharge}[/blue] [gold]Shield Recharge[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_HUSK.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_RETALIATION.title: Arcane Retaliation
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_RETALIATION.descripti: For every [blue]{TotalShield}[/blue] [gold]Shield[/gold] or [gold]Overshield[/gold] at the end of your turn, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_RETALIATION.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_AEGIS.title: Arcane Aegis
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_AEGIS.description: Whenever [gold]Shield[/gold] takes damage, temporarily gain [blue]{ShieldRecharge}[/blue] [gold]Shield Recharge[/gold] for [blue]{Turns}[/blue] {Turns:plural:turn|turns}.
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_AEGIS.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_CREPUSCULAR.title: Arcane Crepuscular
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_CREPUSCULAR.descripti: When you are [gold]Invisible[/gold], temporarily gain [blue]{ShieldRecharge}[/blue] [gold]Shield Recharge[/gold].
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_CREPUSCULAR.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_ICE_STORM.title: Arcane Ice Storm
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_ICE_STORM.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_INFLUENCE.title: Arcane Influence
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_INFLUENCE.description: Whenever you apply [blue]{ElectricityPower}[/blue] [gold]Electricity[/gold], apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Electricity[/gold] to all enemies.
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_INFLUENCE.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_MELT.title: Arcane Melt
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_MELT.description: Whenever you apply [blue]{HeatPower}[/blue] [gold]Heat[/gold], apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Heat[/gold] to a random enemy.
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_MELT.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_OVERCHARGE.title: Arcane Overcharge
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_OVERCHARGE.descriptio: Whenever you gain [gold]Overshield[/gold], deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_OVERCHARGE.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_BARRIER.title: Arcane Barrier
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_BARRIER.description:
Start each combat with [blue]{TotalShield}[/blue] [gold]Shield[/gold], [blue]{ShieldCapacity}[/blue] [gold]Shield Capacity[/gold] and [blue]{ShieldRecharge}[/blue] [gold]Shield Recharge[/gold].
When [gold]Shield[/gold] takes damage, recharge ALL [gold]Shield[/gold], then goes to sleep for [blue]{Turns}[/blue] {Turns:plural:turn|turns}.
WARFRAMEMOD-ARCANE_BARRIER.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
